title: Flame's Create netherrack
description: A mod that adds Create mod recipes for tuff and netherrack.
body:
A basic mod that adds recipes for tuff and netherrack using the create mod.

Features:
- Netherrack recipe: healing potion spouted onto cobblestone.
  ![Netherrack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b409fcd21a1c1427566aec97a9f40ffbd9f5b4d_0.webp)
- Tuff recipe: cobblestone mixed with water.
  ![Tuff Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaec00ff1bf84201ade93206cb3cb5196c6215b0_0.webp)

You will need create for this to take any effect
